title: The Hybrid’s Revenge: The Billionaire Lycan’s Secret Prophecy
intro: She saw the cable snap before it fell—and pulled the billionaire CEO out of death’s path. Now he knows what she is: the hybrid the ancient prophecy spoke of, the one whose blood can burn a kingdom or save it. Hunted by purebloods who want her dead, trapped in a corporate war that hides a centuries-old betrayal, Ella must master her visions, survive assassination attempts, and decide if she can trust the powerful Lycan who claims she’s his fated mate. But the deeper truth is darker: her mother is the Council’s prisoner, her uncle is the ultimate enemy, and the only way to save her people is to bond with him—body, heart, and soul. A hybrid’s revenge will become a queen’s legacy.
sellingPoints: Forced proximity with a possessive billionaire Lycan CEO
Hidden identity and life-or-death stakes from page one
Female lead with rare prophecy power that she must learn to control
Enemies-to-lovers with a fated mate bond that can’t be faked
Revenge against the corrupt Council mixed with a race to save her mother
Epic power awakening and a satisfying journey from victim to queen
coverPrompt: 3:4竖图，手机竖版书封面。主标题区位于上方或中央，标题使用金属质感粗体字，银色或金色描边，字体威严有力，标题占画面约30%空间。主视觉：女主角正面半身特写，表情坚韧且带着隐忍的愤怒或决心，银色或淡蓝色眼睛微发光，皮肤上隐约可见银色符文线条。她身穿现代职场女性衬衫但略带破损或烟熏，右手持一朵带血的白色玫瑰作为标志性道具。背景是深蓝色到黑色的渐变，左上角一轮巨大的血月或银色满月，月光倾泻在她身上。高对比色彩：银色、血红、深蓝、黑色。避免电影海报式的实景感，保持小说封面插画风格；不要出现其他人物或狼形；女主的情绪要强烈但不夸张，眼神直视观者，传达“我掌握命运”的力量感。字体风格：哥特加粗或衬线字体，标题周围留出足够呼吸空间。
rawContent:
=== SHORT_FICTION_PACKAGE_TITLE ===
The Hybrid’s Revenge: The Billionaire Lycan’s Secret Prophecy

=== SHORT_FICTION_INTRO ===
She saw the cable snap before it fell—and pulled the billionaire CEO out of death’s path. Now he knows what she is: the hybrid the ancient prophecy spoke of, the one whose blood can burn a kingdom or save it. Hunted by purebloods who want her dead, trapped in a corporate war that hides a centuries-old betrayal, Ella must master her visions, survive assassination attempts, and decide if she can trust the powerful Lycan who claims she’s his fated mate. But the deeper truth is darker: her mother is the Council’s prisoner, her uncle is the ultimate enemy, and the only way to save her people is to bond with him—body, heart, and soul. A hybrid’s revenge will become a queen’s legacy.

=== SHORT_FICTION_SELLING_POINTS ===
- Forced proximity with a possessive billionaire Lycan CEO
- Hidden identity and life-or-death stakes from page one
- Female lead with rare prophecy power that she must learn to control
- Enemies-to-lovers with a fated mate bond that can’t be faked
- Revenge against the corrupt Council mixed with a race to save her mother
- Epic power awakening and a satisfying journey from victim to queen

=== SHORT_FICTION_COVER_PROMPT ===
3:4竖图，手机竖版书封面。主标题区位于上方或中央，标题使用金属质感粗体字，银色或金色描边，字体威严有力，标题占画面约30%空间。主视觉：女主角正面半身特写，表情坚韧且带着隐忍的愤怒或决心，银色或淡蓝色眼睛微发光，皮肤上隐约可见银色符文线条。她身穿现代职场女性衬衫但略带破损或烟熏，右手持一朵带血的白色玫瑰作为标志性道具。背景是深蓝色到黑色的渐变，左上角一轮巨大的血月或银色满月，月光倾泻在她身上。高对比色彩：银色、血红、深蓝、黑色。避免电影海报式的实景感，保持小说封面插画风格；不要出现其他人物或狼形；女主的情绪要强烈但不夸张，眼神直视观者，传达“我掌握命运”的力量感。字体风格：哥特加粗或衬线字体，标题周围留出足够呼吸空间。
